parents.subject: LU-13783 ldiskfs: Add support for mainline 5.8 kernel

commit.subject: LU-15286 build: only use baseonly option on el7
commit.message:
LU-15286 build: only use baseonly option on el7

el7 baseonly option allow to build perf package while
in el8 does not.
